response.justification: Candidate brings ~14 years of full-stack experience well beyond the 6+ year requirement, with directly relevant TypeScript/Node.js work at multiple Berlin companies, recent AI agent/MCP infrastructure experience matching a key requirement, and demonstrated strengths in TDD, testing, and software craftsmanship. The stack alignment (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker) is strong, though Nest.js and Vitest are not explicitly mentioned and Kotlin/Java exposure appears limited to older robotics work.
strengths: Extensive TypeScript/Node.js/React full-stack experience with MongoDB and AWS at production scale
Current AI agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators directly matches a required skill
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, workshops on testing and Selenium)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed in the primary stack
Limited recent Kotlin/Java experience — Java work appears mostly from ~2014-2018 robotics context
Significant portion of career invested in DLang, which is not part of the target stack

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience
